data.body:
=== CORRECTION: the two "open design questions" were SETTLED in the brainstorm ===
The round-5 critical review re-raised (1) blocking-on-claim-vs-coaching and (2) what-the-signature-certifies. Both
were the brainstorm's CENTRAL debates (session log 63cc, DISCUSSION NARRATIVE comment 37 + final-decisions 38),
resolved with explicit reasoning - NOT open. (1) The brainstorm weighed A blocking-inline / B advisory / C
decoupled-signed-attestation and chose C: claim = FAST check for a signed 'ready' attestation, heavy review
out-of-band, --force escape; the 'hard-gate-is-anti-pattern' research was examined and found NOT to transfer to
autonomous agents (confabulate-not-ask; errors compound; separate-critic >> self-critique). (2) An Opus adversarial
review IN the brainstorm already raised the 'fail-open hollow signal' critique; resolution: cert = 'process followed,
no red flags' + COVERAGE recorded; rich per-criterion verdicts in the REVIEW_RESULT sidecar; CI composes any hard
gate from the signed result + coverage; block-by-default-with-routine-override explicitly REJECTED (>30% FP -> tool
ignored). Corrected epic 5fd2 (the 'Open design questions' section -> 'Design decisions revisited (SETTLED)'). The
genuinely-useful residual is tuning: state end-to-end time-to-first-work honestly; cache busts on edit-then-re-review;
make the CI rigor predicate canonical.

=== EXPERIMENT PLAN to finalize + tune (with a seeded-defect pilot) ===
The recurring gap (and the brainstorm's stated PRIMARY metric): we validated CONSISTENCY (Jaccard), never GROUND
TRUTH. Proposed prioritized plan (docs/experiments/plan-review-validation-experiment-plan.md): E1 seeded-defect
recall/false-accept gold set (top - the only thing that measures whether criteria CATCH what they should; promotes
F10 gold set into the pre-finalize loop); E2 baseline the never-run criteria (G6/T10/T11/T12/T1/T3/T4/T5d/G3/G4/COH);
E3 new-overlay trigger precision; E4 generalization on a NON-DSO corpus (answers the overfit critique); E5 weak/local
model ceiling; E6 G6 alternative-generation + anti-priming; E7 structured-checklist lift A/B.

PILOT (E1, 32 runs): seeded BAD/GOOD plan per criterion for G6/T10/T11/T12/E5/COH/T9/A1. RESULT: RECALL = 100% (8/8
BAD caught as FAIL, both repeats), ZERO rubber-stamping - the new criteria + roll-ins catch the defect they target
(TOCTOU, wildcard-IAM, single-shot migration, 100%-flip, change-detector test, non-atomic counter, premature-
framework, cross-section contradiction). Tuning finding: codebase-grounded criteria (G6/T10/T11/T9/COH) hedge to
AMBIGUOUS (non-blocking) on TERSE good plans run WITHOUT tools - the 'needs the live code' behavior that flips to PASS
with the agentic tier; T12/A1 cleanly PASS. -> run grounded criteria with tools; track AMBIGUOUS-on-clean as the
precision metric. Raw: plan-review-gate/runs/seedpilot.jsonl.

NEXT: expand E1 to 3-5 adjudicated cases per criterion (all 31) with the grounded ones tool-run -> the per-criterion
recall/false-accept/false-fire scorecard to finalize on; then E2/E4.
